---
title: "Welcome"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: sample-listings
  contents: 
  - projects.yml
  - "projects/*.qmd"
  type: default        
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, subtitle, description, categories, date]
  date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
  field-display-names:
    date: "Date Published"
  image-align: left   
  image-height: "150px"
---


```{=html}
<div id="custom-hero-banner" class="hero-banner">
  <div class="hero-container">
    <h1 class="hero-title">Muhammad Khan Muneer</h1>
    <h2 class="hero-subtitle">Data Scientist • BI Engineer • Analytics Engineer</h2>
    <div class="hero-hr"></div>
    <p class="hero-description">
  <strong>Engineering ML‑driven analytics and automated decision systems.</strong><br>
  <span class="hero-subtext">
    Transforming complex data into <strong>Operational Intelligence</strong> with statistical rigor and scalable architecture.
  </span>
</p>
  </div>
</div>

```

## Professional Profile {.unnumbered .unlisted}

I am a Data Science and BI Consultant specializing in **ML-driven automation**, **Big Data engineering**, and **end-to-end decision systems**. With over 10 years of hands-on experience and a background in **Statistics (BSc)** and **Big Data Science & Technology (MSc)**, I design solutions that are mathematically sound, business-aligned, and built for long-term scalability.

### 🧠 Core Expertise {.unnumbered .unlisted}
* **Machine Learning Automation:** Designing end-to-end workflows from feature engineering to model deployment and monitoring (R, Python, MLflow).
* **BI & Analytics Engineering:** Building automated reporting ecosystems, semantic models, and executive-ready KPI warehouses using the Power Platform and SQL.
* **Operational Intelligence:** Specialized experience in healthcare operations, patient flow, logistics (UK-Nigeria routes), and public safety.
* **Digital & Behavior Analytics:** Advanced funnel modeling and conversion optimization using GA4 and BigQuery.

### 🛠️ Technical Stack {.unnumbered .unlisted}
* **Programming:** R (Expert), Python, SQL, Spark (PySpark/SparkR).
* **Cloud & Data:** Azure, GCP, BigQuery, Databricks.
* **Visualization:** Power BI (Advanced DAX/Power Query), Looker Studio, Tableau.
* **Workflow:** Git, Docker, Linux/WSL, Quarto.

---

## Featured Projects {.unnumbered .unlisted}
*Explore a curated selection of analytics, BI engineering, and operational intelligence projects.*

::: {#sample-listings}
:::

<br>

---

<hr>

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 40px 0;">
  <h3 style="margin-bottom: 25px; color: #333;">Let's Connect</h3>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mkmuneer" class="btn btn-primary" style="margin: 10px; padding: 12px 30px;">
    <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/mkhanmuneer" class="btn btn-dark" style="margin: 10px; padding: 12px 30px;">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
  </a>
  <a href="https://www.kaggle.com/muhammadkhanmuneer" class="btn btn-info" style="color: white; margin: 10px; padding: 12px 30px;">
    <i class="bi bi-graph-up"></i> Kaggle
  </a>
</div>
